name: GH_LineParserAction
summary: Enumerates the possible actions a line parser can invoke.

enum_values.name: Include
enum_values.summary: Include the return code of the parser function.

enum_values.name: Ignore
enum_values.summary: Ignore this line of text and move on to the next line.

enum_values.name: Abort
enum_values.summary: Ignore this line of text and don't parse all subsequent lines.
